checks.name: registered production files contain LeeWay headers
webview to host commands are owned by identity graph
host to webview commands are owned by identity graph
handled commands are owned by identity graph
registered VS Code commands are owned by identity graph
manifest VS Code commands are owned by identity graph
LAVR emitted events are owned by identity graph
LAVR emitted events have registered consumers
key source directories are covered by identity graph
historical dist start path is quarantined
checks.detail: Historical dist start path exists and is quarantined.

nodes.name: Application identity graph registry
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines the canonical LeeWay application node graph, command ownership, and active-file coverage model.

nodes.name: VS Code extension manifest entrypoint
nodes.runtimeRole: Declares the single production extension entrypoint and activation surface.

nodes.name: VS Code command registration manifest
nodes.runtimeRole: Declares the command palette and surfaced extension command contract.

nodes.name: Extension activation host
nodes.runtimeRole: Activates the extension host and owns the production runtime pipeline.

nodes.name: Agent Lee webview panel host
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns the primary webview panel lifecycle and boot logs.

nodes.name: Agent Lee webview runtime
nodes.runtimeRole: Renders the webview HTML runtime and binds UI controls to the runtime pipeline.

nodes.name: Webview message poster
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns host-to-panel UI updates and webview-visible runtime state posting.

nodes.name: Webview message handler
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns panel-to-host message handling for buttons, settings, approvals, and conversation routes.

nodes.name: Webview to host command router
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns commands emitted from the webview runtime into the extension host.

nodes.name: Host to webview command router
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns messages and UI state updates emitted from the extension host into the webview.

nodes.name: Runtime settings hydration
nodes.runtimeRole: Loads, normalizes, and persists runtime state for the active extension pipeline.

nodes.name: Workspace intelligence root
nodes.runtimeRole: Discovers workspace files, extracts local paths and URLs, and builds bounded context samples.

nodes.name: LeeWay write policy classifier
nodes.runtimeRole: Classifies governed files and excludes reports, knowledge, logs, and build output from live source treatment.

nodes.name: Remote context URL resolver
nodes.runtimeRole: Resolves remote URLs into controlled external context for Agent Lee tasks.

nodes.name: Background workspace indexer
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns background indexing, dependency lookup, and command-map oriented workspace summaries.

nodes.name: Model hive router
nodes.runtimeRole: Classifies task type and routes Builder, Designer, Verifier, visual, and web helper roles.

nodes.name: Local model hive code generation binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Binds local model output to LeeWay identity, classification, and verification law before generated code is accepted.

nodes.name: Model governance
nodes.runtimeRole: Applies governance rules to local model routing and usage.

nodes.name: Engineering loop root
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns inspect, plan, stage, approve, apply, verify, and receipt execution flow.

nodes.name: Engineering loop code generation binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Requires stage, apply, verify, and receipt flow to remain bound to LeeWay identity graph and integrity law.

nodes.name: Edit buffer command set
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns staged diff review, diff opening, accept/reject, and apply-and-verify command routes.

nodes.name: LeeWay application standards construction law
nodes.runtimeRole: Enforces LeeWay construction law for agents, autocomplete, repair flows, generated code, commands, events, pipelines, receipts, and cleanup plans.

nodes.name: Law engine root
nodes.runtimeRole: Blocks force-push, overwrite-core, unsafe-terminal, direct-main-push, and bulk-delete actions.

nodes.name: Standalone connectivity loader
nodes.runtimeRole: Resolves canonical standalone roots for SDK, MCP, agents, governance, and persona assets.

nodes.name: Codex code generation law binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Binds Codex-generated work in this repository to LeeWay identity, classification, receipts, and gates from the first draft.

nodes.name: ChatGPT-style agent law binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Binds repo-facing agent behavior to LeeWay construction law before code, cleanup, or repair is considered complete.

nodes.name: Autocomplete law binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Requires autocomplete-produced code to inherit LeeWay identity, file classification, and gate closure rules.

nodes.name: MCP agent law binding
nodes.runtimeRole: Binds MCP-routed and plugin-routed agent output to LeeWay identity graph and integrity-gate requirements.

nodes.name: Persona runtime bridge
nodes.runtimeRole: Builds the Agent Lee runtime prompt from sovereign persona, heritage canon, and anti-generic rules.

nodes.name: Capability catalog builder
nodes.runtimeRole: Builds the live capability catalog from MCP, agent, and server sources.

nodes.name: Plugin and MCP router
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns plugin routing, plugin guards, registry lookup, and adapter dispatch.

nodes.name: Internal tool router
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns internal tool routing including scan, verify, web-search, image, and permission helpers.

nodes.name: Browser validator root
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns Playwright session startup, visual evidence capture, flow execution, performance, and accessibility checks.

nodes.name: Local memory ledger
nodes.runtimeRole: Writes runtime and agent-event memory ledgers for continuity and audit.

nodes.name: Knowledge repo indexer
nodes.runtimeRole: Indexes workspace source into the knowledge store while excluding reports, knowledge, memory, logs, and build output.

nodes.name: LeeWay Agent Voice local runtime
nodes.runtimeRole: Primary local-only voice runtime for transcript bridge driven voice turns.

nodes.name: LeeWay Agent Voice browser fallback
nodes.runtimeRole: Fallback browser speech runtime used only when local browser microphone capture is needed.

nodes.name: LAVR turn gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns utterance lifecycle, partial/final aggregation, commit scheduling, and turn commit emission.

nodes.name: LAVR tool bus
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns tool request routing, tool completion propagation, and tool timeout/error handling.

nodes.name: LAVR playback gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns assistant playback lifecycle, stale segment suppression, and stop/cancel deduplication.

nodes.name: LAVR transcript bridge
nodes.runtimeRole: Owns localhost transcript intake and forwards accepted text into the voice command path.

nodes.name: LAVR interrupt gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Bridges runtime interrupt events from the provider layer into the host command router.

nodes.name: Live voice command family
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers the live voice command surface for transcript bridge, speech status, session controls, and file blocking.

nodes.name: VSIX package build
nodes.runtimeRole: Builds the extension package that the integrity gate inspects.

nodes.name: VSIX package leakage scan
nodes.runtimeRole: Scans the packaged VSIX surface for stale artifacts and excluded providers.
verification: VSIX stale artifact and cloud-provider leakage scan

nodes.name: Package surface ignore rules
nodes.runtimeRole: Defines the non-shipping package surface and excludes debug, test, and stale adapter artifacts.
verification: VSIX stale artifact and cloud-provider leakage scan

nodes.name: Release metadata sync
nodes.runtimeRole: Prevents package.json and package-lock.json drift before packaging.

nodes.name: Deterministic VSIX writer
nodes.runtimeRole: Writes the versioned VSIX package using the canonical package manifest.

nodes.name: Historical dist start-path quarantine
nodes.runtimeRole: Historical dist output must never be treated as the active production start path while out/extension.js is canonical.

nodes.name: LeeWay application integrity gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Verification-only application integrity gate for runtime, packaging, and governance checks.

nodes.name: LeeWay construction law gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Verifies the skill layer, repo law layer, instruction surfaces, code-generation bindings, and smoke-test evidence for LeeWay construction law.

nodes.name: Application identity graph gate
nodes.runtimeRole: Verifies node registration, command ownership, active-file coverage, quarantine paths, and identity evidence.

nodes.name: Agent Lee doctor baseline
nodes.runtimeRole: Runs baseline doctor and LeeWay compliance checks for governed artifacts.

nodes.name: LeeWay header compliance
nodes.runtimeRole: Validates LeeWay header presence and governed file compliance.

nodes.name: Primary extension command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers the core Agent Lee open, scan, verify, engineer, patch, receipt, and runtime commands.

nodes.name: Legacy manifest command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Manifest-only commands kept visible for audit until they are either rewired or removed.

nodes.name: Visual intelligence command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers and owns the LVIS panel and visual-system command routes.

nodes.name: Coding session command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers and owns coding-session start, pause, resume, status, summary, and export receipt commands.

nodes.name: Performance command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers performance profile, override, service, and status command routes.

nodes.name: Indexing command surface
nodes.runtimeRole: Registers background indexing, dependency, command-map, and symbol-search commands.

nodes.name: LAVR runtime smoke harness
nodes.runtimeRole: Exercises runtime provider selection and local/fallback behavior.

nodes.name: LAVR host router dynamic harness
nodes.runtimeRole: Exercises emitted versus handled host router behavior for LAVR flows.

nodes.name: LAVR playback gate dynamic harness
nodes.runtimeRole: Exercises playback stop/cancel and stale segment suppression behavior.
